possibly the worst moderation on the planet. report this review, but this game is one of the ONLY instances where i have been banned in the middle of me talking and explaining my situation AND one of the only instances where i’ve been banned just a few days after i got the game. i supposedly “went after a forsaken player and started cursing them.” i said that the game wasn’t good for MANY MANY reasons, such as child… you know. i also apparently was saying he should get off the game, which i have no recollection of. i started to get into the game after the few days i had started playing, and would enjoy the game when i played it. i also saw on ANOTHER review that you should only be 13, which, by the sound of his voice, he was not. when explaining to the mods, another party said i was targeting them, which makes no sense, cause they were always going after ME for stating my opinion about the game. in the middle of talking to the other party, i was kicked. and i thought one of the RULES were to not AVOID moderation. goofiest tomfoolery ever.
